titleStmt.title: SII 15.611: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 611. (B.K. No. 189 of 1928-29.) AṆṆIGĒRI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar to the left of the southern entrance (inner side) into the Amṛitēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1153, Khara, Bhādrapada-Amāvāsyā, Saṁkrānti, Thursday, corresponding to 1231 A.D., August 28, Thursday, f.d.t. °04, the Saṁkrānti being Kanyā.

It records the gift of income from the Pannāya tax to the god Svayaṁbhu Amṛitēśvara of Rājadhāni-paṭṭaṇa Aṇṇigeṟe, by Āriya Rēviseṭṭi who is styled Koṁkaṇadēśachakravartti (i.e., supreme lord of the Koṅkaṇa country).
A gift to the god Bhairava is mentioned in the supplementary portion engraved on the second face of the pillar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya nagarā
raṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyu
dayaśca śakavarṣada 1153 neya kharasaṁvatsarada bhādra
padamāvāsya byatīpāta saṁkrāṁti brihaspativāradaṁ
du śrīmaccaturyugada rājadhānipaṭṭaṇa vaṁṇniṁge
ṟeya śrīsvayaṁbhuyamritēśvaradēvara saṁni
dhānadalu śrīmatu koṁkaṇadēśacakravartti śrīvīra bhu
jabaḷa yāriya rēvaseṭṭiyaru yā paṭṭaṇadalu muṁ
na naḍautirdda paṁnāyamaṁ dhārāpūrvvakamāgi biṭṭa
śāśana yidanāvanake vorbbanu manavacanakāyadiṁ yaḷi
pi naḍasihineṁdaḍe svānagārddhaba cāṁḍāḷa svargga�rtya pātā
ḷake hoṟagu śrī vāraṇāsiyalu brāhmaṇa kapi
leya vadhiyisidavana gatige hōhanu biṭṭa puṁṇyādhika
ge rājyābhyudaya maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī . ©

jyēvaṇadalli maga sōya biṭṭa tāravoṁdu bhairavadēvari
ge Arāḍidarādaḍaṁ koḍudavana
Digital edition of SII 15.611 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
